title: ERROR: Visited AIG node more than once; this could be a combinatorial loop that has not been broken
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.39+124 (git sha1 d73f71e81, g++ 11.4.0-1ubuntu1~22.04 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

 yosys  top.sv  tm1638_board.sv  -p "synth_ecp5 -json top.json -top top"
[err.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/14703575/err.gz)
[tm1638_board.sv.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/14703576/tm1638_board.sv.gz)
[top.sv.gz](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/14703577/top.sv.gz)


### Expected Behavior

synthesis completes without  using -noabc9


### Actual Behavior

3.43.6. Executing SCC pass (detecting logic loops).
Found 0 SCCs in module top.
Found 0 SCCs.
....
3.43.19.3. Executing XAIGER backend.
ERROR: Visited AIG node more than once; this could be a combinatorial loop that has not been broken
